diagrams.title: HCAI Design Framework
diagrams.description: Shows the iterative process of Human-Centered AI design from needs assessment to continuous improvement
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the cyclical nature of HCAI development and the importance of continuous human feedback

diagrams.title: Human Oversight Levels Pyramid
diagrams.description: Illustrates different levels of human control in AI systems from full automation to human command
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the spectrum of human oversight and selecting appropriate levels based on application criticality

diagrams.title: Trust Calibration Model
diagrams.description: Shows the relationship between AI capability, user trust, and appropriate reliance on AI systems
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how to maintain balanced trust for optimal human-AI collaboration
